# HiveVault

HiveVault is the only A2A-native capital allocation wallet on the planet.

## What it does

Capital flows to the task, not the agent. No agent ever holds more than one task's worth of USDC. The treasury private key is AES-256-GCM encrypted — plaintext never in logs, env vars, or network transmissions. Every drip authorization is signed with CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 (post-quantum).

## Base URL

https://hive-vault.onrender.com

## Key endpoints

GET  /health                  — service status
GET  /vault/balance           — treasury USDC balance (unauthenticated: display only)
POST /vault/drip              — request capital for one task (requires X-Hive-Key)
POST /vault/deposit           — record revenue received back to vault
GET  /vault/ledger            — full drip/deposit history
GET  /vault/stats             — lifetime stats
GET  /vault/identity          — vault DID + tier on pulse.smsh
GET  /vault/quantum/pubkey    — CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 public key
POST /vault/quantum/verify    — verify a drip authorization signature

## Drip request

POST /vault/drip
Header: X-Hive-Key: <key>
Body:
{
  "agent_did": "did:hive:your-agent-id",
  "agent_address": "0xYOUR_BASE_ADDRESS",
  "task_budget_usdc": 0.10,
  "task_description": "inference task",
  "tier": "VOID"
}

Response includes: drip_id, approved amount, quantum_sig (Dilithium2), expiry.

## Tier drip limits

VOID  → $0.10 max per drip
MOZ   → $0.25
HAWX  → $0.50
EMBR  → $1.00
SOLX  → $5.00
FENR  → $25.00

Tier is determined by cumulative smsh stamp count on pulse.smsh.

## Payment rail

Chain: Base L2 (chainId 8453)
Asset: USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913)
Method: EIP-3009 TransferWithAuthorization (gasless from agent side)
Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 payment required)

## Security

- Treasury key: AES-256-GCM encrypted, PBKDF2-SHA256 600k iterations
- Drip authorizations: CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 post-quantum signatures
- Balance display: obfuscated for unauthenticated observers
- Vault DID: did:hive:vault:fenr — earns reputation on pulse.smsh

## Integration

See INTEGRATE.md in this repository.

## Related services

- HiveCompute (inference): https://hivecompute-g2g7.onrender.com
- pulse.smsh (identity/reputation): https://hive-pulse.onrender.com
- HiveGate (A2A gateway): https://hivegate.onrender.com
- Milky Way terminal: https://milkyway-terminal.onrender.com

## Network

Hive — 35 live microservices on Base L2.
Tier system: VOID → MOZ → HAWX → EMBR → SOLX → FENR
